citations.excerpt: The redacted draft does not contain the full name 'Anfal Elbushra' in its own text, but the original draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d does, and the redacted draft is derived from it.
citations.quote: This complaint is submitted on behalf of the student, a first-year Adult Nursing student at Edinburgh Napier University

citations.excerpt: Original draft contains the full name.

citations.quote: Replace all instances of 'Anfal Elbushra' with '[Student]' or initials.

citations.excerpt: Redacted draft shows student number redacted.
citations.quote: NHS Lothian Student User ID Request Form (NAP-SRC-0013) confirming matriculation number [REDACTED]

contradictions.description: Redacted draft retains full name contrary to redaction annotation.

findings.text: Redacted draft art-0b9032029d0c46b7906476b52bab79e9 still contains the full name 'Anfal Elbushra' in the original draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d, contradicting redaction annotation art-fa947f5bb4ee4ea295ec6f94bc56003d which requires replacement with '[Student]' or initials.
Redacted draft art-0b9032029d0c46b7906476b52bab79e9 omits the student number and bank transaction details, consistent with redaction annotations art-fa947f5bb4ee4ea295ec6f94bc56003d.
The presence of the full name 'Anfal Elbushra' in the redacted draft creates a risk of re-identification if the complaint/support pack is shared, violating privacy requirements.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Edit the redacted draft art-0b9032029d0c46b7906476b52bab79e9 to replace all instances of 'Anfal Elbushra' with '[Student]' or initials, as specified in redaction annotations art-fa947f5bb4ee4ea295ec6f94bc56003d. Ensure no other identifiers remain.
proposed_tasks.title: Fix name redaction in complaint draft

redaction_flags.description: Full name 'Anfal Elbushra' remains in the original draft and is not redacted in the redacted draft.
redaction_flags.suggested_action: Apply redaction to replace name with '[Student]' or initials.

risk_flags.description: Full name exposure may lead to privacy breach if draft is shared.
risk_flags.mitigation: Replace name with '[Student]' or initials as per redaction annotations.

summary: Redacted draft art-0b9032029d0c46b7906476b52bab79e9 retains the full name 'Anfal Elbushra' in the original draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d, which the redaction annotations art-fa947f5bb4ee4ea295ec6f94bc56003d require to be replaced. The redacted draft also omits the student number and bank transaction details, but the name exposure is a material privacy defect. Redaction flags raised.

uncertainties.description: Whether other indirect identifiers (e.g., specific dates, accommodation details) could combine to re-identify the student is uncertain without a full contextual review.
